# Curtis Concrete Direct Llc

> Concrete Contractor serving Albany, NY and surrounding areas. Curtis Concrete Direct Llc provides quality concrete contractor services in Albany, NY. Licensed, insured, and locally trusted.

## Key Facts
- Business: Curtis Concrete Direct Llc
- Category: Concrete Contractor
- Location: Serving Albany, NY, Albany, NY
- Phone: (518) 708-1687
- Email: contact@curtis-concrete-direct-llc.com
- Rating: 4.9/5 from 127 reviews
- Years in business: 1
- Jobs completed: 50

## Services
- [Remodeling](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/concrete contractor/curtis-concrete-direct-llc//services/remodel/): Kitchen, bathroom, and whole-home remodeling done right.
- [Additions](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/concrete contractor/curtis-concrete-direct-llc//services/addition/): Home additions and extensions built to match your existing space.
- [Basement Finishing](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/concrete contractor/curtis-concrete-direct-llc//services/basement/): Basement finishing, waterproofing, and conversion.
- [Deck Building](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/concrete contractor/curtis-concrete-direct-llc//services/deck/): Custom deck design and construction for outdoor living.
- [Foundation](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/concrete contractor/curtis-concrete-direct-llc//services/foundation/): Foundation repair, crack sealing, and new concrete pours.
- [General Contracting](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/concrete contractor/curtis-concrete-direct-llc//services/general/): Full-service general contracting for residential projects.

## Frequently Asked Questions
- **Do you offer free estimates?** Yes, we provide free, no-obligation estimates for all concrete contractor services.
- **Are you licensed and insured?** Absolutely. We are fully licensed, bonded, and insured for your protection.
- **What areas do you serve?** We serve Albany, NY and surrounding communities.
- **How quickly can you respond?** We offer same-day and 24/7 emergency service for urgent issues.
- **Do you guarantee your work?** Yes, we stand behind every job with a 100% satisfaction guarantee.
